content_fingerprint: lighton ai open sources denseon and lateon claiming state of the art results for single and multi vector retrieval models lighton ai has published denseon and lateon a pair of open embedding techniques that the company says push past prior benchmarks for both single vector and multi vector retrieval setups with models and code shared via hugging face lighton ai posted a new article on the hugging face blog this week introducing denseon and lateon a pair of techniques and model variants aimed at dense and late interaction retrieval the post appeared on the community blog on april 21 2026 author
